Bash(/home/madhur/agit/agit commit -m "feat: add Istio VirtualService for canary traffic splitting on auth-service" --task "Set up canary deployment for auth-service v2 — start at 5% traffic, ramp to 100% over 1 week if error rate stays below 0.1%" --intent "Use Istio traffic splitting instead of DNS-based canary so we can control rollout without DNS TTL delays.
